notes: No client recovery layer, no overlay, no floating hints.
Confirmed by test: direct /app?postId=28&title=Post%2028 works, while native MAX open_app button loses post identity.
Comment button builder now uses explicit app URL with commentKey/channelId/postId by default instead of native open_app payload.
ADMINKIT_USE_OPEN_APP_BUTTON=1 can re-enable native open_app deliberately, but default product path is explicit app URL.
Next architectural step remains postSnapshot rendering inside comments: text/media/format/link stored at patch time and displayed above the discussion.
